title: roldana ehrenbergiana
intro: Roldana ehrenbergiana, also known as Mexican Fleabane, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and the southwestern United States, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Roldana ehrenbergiana include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
